data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for replay access entitlements post-event.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Replay access entitlements post-event'. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or endpoints related to how replay access is managed or granted after the event. This lack of critical information indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively performed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of replay access entitlements being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify replay access entitlements post-event.
